description: SignNow is an e-signature platform for uploading documents, preparing them for signing, sending signature requests, and managing templates and document workflows. It also offers AI-agent access to those workflows through an MCP server.
summary: SignNow exposes a REST API at https://api.signnow.com authenticated with SignNow-issued API keys, OAuth bearer tokens, or in some cases a Basic Authorization Token, plus a hosted OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp-server.signnow.com/mcp.
